title: Quest Stainless Steel Electric Egg Boiler / 8-Hole Egg Cooker Rack / 500ml Capacity / 60 Minute Timer & Auto Cut-Off/Transparent Cover / 500W (34369)
features: ELECTRIC EGG BOILER – This 500W Egg Steamer allows you to cook up to 8 eggs at once time, producing enough freshly boiled eggs for the whole family. It features a maximum water capacity of 500ml.

CONVENIENT DESIGN – A cup is included with the cooker to help you use the exact amount of water needed. Its compact structure makes it ideal for smaller kitchens, with the full unit measuring just H18 x W21.5 x D13.5cm and its base features non-slip feet for stability.

STAINLESS STEEL – Featuring stainless steel housing, the electric steamer is durable and easy to clean. Its egg tray rack features cool touch handles, and its boil dry protection automatically cuts off cooking once done, which also saves electricity.

EASILY ADJUSTABLE – The egg cooker’s timer can easily be adjusted via the dial on the front, up to a maximum of 60 minutes, allowing for perfect precision. A power indicator light is visible next to the dial, so that you can always tell when cooking is in progress.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Compact Structure The egg cooker features a sleek, compact structure, enabling you to save space on any worktop. Transparent Cover Safely monitor the cooking progress through the transparent lid, which also features steam vents. 60 Minute Timer Use the dial on the front of the egg boiler to adjust the timer up to 60 minutes with ease. Precision Cooking Thanks to the egg cooker's adjustable timer & water levels, you can boil eggs exactly how you like.
